title: IMMIGRATION AND COUNSELING - 211info
text: IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION IMMIGRATION AND COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides certified immigration assistance to immigrants and refugees, including permanent resident status adjustment, employment authorization, citizenship status, family reunification, and replacement of lost green cards. 10301 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Immigrants and refugees Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (971) 271-6537 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 271-6537 IRCO Immigration Legal Services Team [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None (this does not include USCIS application fees) DOCUMENTS: Documents vary by type of application; you will be told what documents to bring when your appointment is scheduled LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement. IRCO has language resources available to ensure that clients can speak with someone in their own language for all programs. AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH ACADEMIC SUPPORT AND PARENT ENGAGEMENT EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INTERNATIONAL LANGUAGE BANK INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SERVICES AGAINST EXPLOITATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SLAVIC AND EASTERN EUROPEAN CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH MENTORING INFORMATION SERVICES - SENIOR SERVICES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - GANG PREVENTION AND INTERVENTION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - FAMILY PROGRAMS PUBLIC SAFETY - PRESCHOOL FOR ALL EARLY CHILDHOOD PROGRAM TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - TAX SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION
